hero.subtitle: Push your limits
hero.description: The first Swiss fitness coaching platform powered by certified experts. Custom nutrition plans, 6-day PPL program, AI coach 24/7.
hero.hero_alt: Athlete training hard in a MoovX gym
hero.marquee: STRENGTH • HYPERTROPHY • NUTRITION • BARCODE SCANNER • PPL 6 DAYS • AI COACH 24/7 • SWISS MADE

marquee.text: Nutrition Pro ✦ Push Pull Legs ✦ Barcode Scanner ✦ Fitness Recipes ✦ Personal Coach ✦ HIIT & LISS ✦ Personal Records ✦ Video Feedback ✦ Swiss Made ✦ Connected Coaching

steps.lede: Your transformation starts now. Not tomorrow.
steps.step1_desc: 2 minutes. Goals, measurements, dietary preferences, fitness level.
steps.step2_desc: AI learns what you eat and adapts all your nutrition plans.
steps.step3_desc: PPL 6 days + personalized nutrition. Log your meals and workouts.
steps.step4_desc: Progress charts, personal records, before/after photos.

nutrition.lede: 7-day plans generated by certified experts, adapted to your exact macros. Scan your fridge, we create your plan.
nutrition.feature1_desc: Generated by certified experts, adapted to your exact macros
nutrition.feature3_desc: Database specific to the Swiss market
nutrition.feature4_desc: Complete selection of balanced fitness recipes
nutrition.image_alt: Salmon avocado broccoli quinoa bowl — MoovX nutrition plan example

training.lede: Push / Pull / Legs over 6 days, HIIT & LISS cardio integrated. 163 video-guided exercises by certified experts.
training.image_alt: Mountain runner at sunset — MoovX cardio training

tracking.lede: Visualize your progression, celebrate every record, keep the pace. Your data 100% hosted in Switzerland, encrypted.
tracking.feature2_desc: Compare your evolution month by month, privately
tracking.feature3_desc: Track your PRs on every exercise, celebrate every milestone
tracking.feature4_desc: Maintain your rhythm, never break the chain
tracking.feature5_desc: Personalized reminders based on your weight and activity
tracking.feature6_desc: Your data hosted in Switzerland, end-to-end encrypted
tracking.image_alt: MoovX progress dashboard — analytics, body composition, recovery
